title: rosa communis var. verlotii
intro: Rosa communis var. verlotii, also known as the Alpenrose or Alpenrosenrose, is a variety of the Rosa communis plant, which is a flowering plant species in the family Rosaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa communis var. verlotii are said to include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and well-being.
